generated_exposure.exposure_text: Local emergency services are overwhelmed by unnecessary civil defense drills. My neighbor's small business had to close for a full day last month because of an unannounced 'preparedness exercise.' These drills are just a waste of taxpayer money and disrupt our daily lives. We need to focus on real security threats, not these political theater exercises. #CommonSenseSecurity #LocalBusinessFirst
